meta_title: For Freelancers: design with AI to Solve no marketing skills (Beginner Tutorial)
meta_description: Learn how to design with AI and overcome no marketing skills. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Design with AI: Overcome Marketing Gaps for Freelancers
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with marketing. Learn to design with AI using Antigravity and Claude Code to deliver high-converting assets for your freelance clients fast.
content.answer_block: You don't need a marketing degree to scale your freelance business. By leveraging Antigravity for rapid asset generation and Claude Code for automated styling, you can produce professional-grade marketing designs. This workflow allows you to ship high-conversion visual content in minutes, effectively bridging your skill gap while maintaining premium output.
content.intro:
The screen glows, the cursor blinks, and your client is waiting for a brand identity that converts. You have the technical skills to build the product, but the marketing side feels like an insurmountable wall of jargon and aesthetics you haven't mastered. The fear of delivering something that looks amateurish is the silent killer of freelance profit margins.

But the game has changed. You no longer need to be a designer or a growth hacker to ship world-class marketing assets. By integrating AI-driven design tools into your development stack, you turn your weaknesses into your secret weapon, delivering a total package that keeps clients coming back for more.

steps.title: Define Brand Identity with AI
steps.description: Before designing, you need a cohesive visual language. Use AI to extract a professional palette and typography based on your client's niche.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Act as a senior brand strategist. Generate a cohesive 5-color palette, primary and secondary font pairings, and a minimalist logo concept description for a [Niche] SaaS startup.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Create a brand_guidelines.json file based on the output of my last design prompt.'

steps.title: Generate High-Conversion Layouts
steps.description: Translate your brand identity into a wireframe. Focus on hierarchy and whitespace to ensure the design feels high-end.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a landing page layout structure for a [Niche] product. Prioritize conversion-focused sections: hero with CTA, social proof, and feature cards. Use clear CSS grid specifications.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Generate a React component structure for this landing page using Tailwind CSS classes.'

steps.title: Automate Asset Generation
steps.description: Use AI to populate your design with professional-grade placeholder imagery and copy that speaks to the user's pain points.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate 3 high-quality prompt descriptions for hero images that convey [Emotion/Goal] for a [Niche] audience. Provide descriptive text for the image generator.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Integrate these image placeholders into the hero section and ensure responsiveness.'

steps.title: Refine with Claude Code
steps.description: Use Claude Code to iterate on the design code, ensuring the UI is pixel-perfect and the CSS is optimized for speed.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the current CSS for my landing page and optimize for mobile-first performance and visual consistency.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Refactor the CSS to use a consistent design system based on my brand_guidelines.json file.'

steps.title: Final QA and Export
steps.description: Perform a final check of the marketing assets to ensure all call-to-actions are clear and the design is ready for production deployment.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a checklist for a professional marketing site launch. What are the top 5 conversion killers I should look for in this design?
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Audit the current codebase for accessibility and SEO best practices.'

pro_tips: Always define a 'design system' JSON file first so your AI agents maintain consistency across different pages.
Use Claude Code to generate unit tests for your UI components to ensure marketing updates don't break functionality.
Ask your AI to 'critique the design like a skeptical customer' to identify UX friction points before shipping.
Keep your prompts modular; reuse your brand identity prompt across multiple projects to save hours of setup time.
Leverage the 'Claude Code' history to quickly revert to previous design iterations if a client requests a change in direction.
content.next_steps: Once your first project is live, analyze the conversion metrics, feed that data back into your Antigravity prompts to iterate, and use the results as a case study to charge higher premiums for your next client.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting a lack of marketing expertise hold your freelance career back. Gain the leverage of a full design team by mastering these AI tools today. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
